Video.summary: Trace the history of post-Roman Britain.

Video.summary: Investigate archaeological and historical evidence that support the existence of an Arthur-like figure.
Video.grandparentTitle: King Arthur: History and Legend
Video.title: An Arthur-Like Figure in Cornwall

Video.title: The Round Table - Arthur in Wace and Layamon

Video.summary: Encounter the works of Marie de France, who developed themes of romantic love, the magical, and the noble.

Video.summary: Look at the hierarchical society of France in the 1780s: the clergy, the nobles, and the peasants.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living the French Revolution and the Age of Napoleon
Video.title: Privilege - Old Regime Society

Video.summary: Join the debates over modernity and politics among writers such as Voltaire, Diderot, and Rousseau.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living the French Revolution and the Age of Napoleon
Video.title: The Enlightenment

Video.summary: See how global trade disrupted traditional societal hierarchy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living the French Revolution and the Age of Napoleon
Video.title: France, Global Commerce, and Colonization

Video.summary: Explore the economic problems of France in the 1780s.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living the French Revolution and the Age of Napoleon
Video.title: American Revolution and the Economic Crisis

American Revolution and the Economic Crisis

Video.summary: Explore how the Third Estate created a revolutionary new Assembly to represent all France.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living the French Revolution and the Age of Napoleon
Video.title: The Political Awakening of 1789

Video.summary: Unpack the story of one of the most famous days in French history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living the French Revolution and the Age of Napoleon
Video.title: July 14th - Storming the Bastille

Video.summary: Learn what happened when the political revolution became a social one.

Video.title: The Mystery Cults
